Categories.Comment: Aimbot is very smooth and works well
Visuals are very clean, but chams can have some more options
Could do with some work, they use a free menu
Very fast updates
Has some nice visual features like lighting & skybox changer
The aimbot is very good, works for every game, and can be set to look very legit or very rage, depending on what you want.
The visuals are good and very customizable, but they could add more visual features.
The interface isn’t the best, but you can still find what you’re looking for.
The cheat is always up to date
It needs more features, but the ones it has are good

Reviews.Author: 283czm4nyi
Reviews.Comment: Overall, it's worth for the price of just $8.99 (w/Free 1 Day Trial). Stable, Reliable, Legit Features Packed, and good performance when toggling many features. Never had any significant stutters/FPS drops.

Categories.Comment: The best part of this External. Aimbot is stable, doesn't tank performance, packed with legit features (Prediction/Aim Randomization), stable Visible/Wall Check, Toggleable Auto Aim, Wall Bang check, and especially no unwanted mouse flickers/jittering unlike other Externals with a higher price tag/subscription model.

Player ESP, Radar, and World Visuals are pretty average and simple, just like other Externals, with stable player caching. However the Weapon/Melee Skin Changer (Currently only for Arsenal) makes up for it.

As of writing, it uses a Public ImGui Menu (Pandora) as a placeholder. A simple, not too flashy, but average UI.
Their 'new' and original Menu is still in the works as they focus on features.

Fast Updates, they use their own Public Offset Dumper, that has consistent preupdates.
Stability wise; never had crashes/major bugs while playing other than messing with the current UI so far. They actively work on/take feedback on bugs and suggestions.

Featurewise, it's really good for Legit Cheating. (Decent Aimbot, ESP, FOV Customization)  There is Character Manipulation, but they're pretty basic/average that you could find in other externals. The LuaU VM is still a work in progress as of writing this, just a base.

Custom Models support, is still in progress, currently only Phantom Forces and Bloxstrike, however the PF support is better than certain externals, non-buggy Teamcheck and Wallcheck, and the performance doesn't drop as much than other externals.
